chat_log.content:
Hello.

Before we begin working together, I need to build an accurate picture of where you actually are — not the pitch version, the honest one.

This is a one-time intake interview. It takes about 30 minutes. I'll ask about your background, what you're building, and what you actually want across three time horizons. Your answers will shape how I coach you going forward.

There are no right answers. The less polished your responses are, the more useful this will be.

Ready to start?
